item.trainmurdermystery.bat.desc: Vanilla attack logic, left click to hit.
item.trainmurdermystery.defense_vial.des:
Outlaws can drink directly to gain a shield.
Regular players can right-click a tray to pour the defense vial onto it.
The next player who takes and consumes the defense vial will gain a shield.
Max 1 shield layer gained this way.
item.noellesroles.bucket_of_h2so4.desc:
Cleaner item.
Right-click a corpse to dispose of it.
item.noellesroles.camera_shears.desc: Has 3 durability, 30s cooldown. Right-click a camera to disable it for 90 seconds.
item.noellesroles.cooked_food.desc: Cooked by the Chef. Has various effects when cooked.
item.noellesroles.letter.desc: When task point vision is active, holding the letter reveals item vending machines.
item.noellesroles.master_key.desc: Can open any door. Blocked by the Engineer's locks, but lockpick failure does not consume the master key. Drops upon death.
item.noellesroles.master_key_p.desc: Can open regular wooden doors. Has limited uses. Blocked by the Engineer's locks.
item.noellesroles.noell_artisan_key.desc: Artisan key crafted by the Locksmith. Opens doors ignoring any installed items or lockpick locks, without destroying reinforcements. Does not drop on death.
item.noellesroles.noell_key_blank.desc: Locksmith key crafting item. Right-click to start the key forging minigame. Consumes 1 blank key regardless of success or failure.
item.noellesroles.noell_paperclip.desc: Single-use door opening item. Opens doors not locked by a lockpick.
item.trainmurdermystery.iron_door_key.de: Can open iron doors. Has limited uses.
item.trainmurdermystery.key.desc:
Key used to open your own room.
When task point vision is active, holding the key reveals your own room door.
item.starrailexpress.knife.desc: Melee weapon. Left click to knockback, right-click to raise and then strike down to kill.
item.starrailexpress.bat.desc: Melee weapon, left click to attack. Has attack cooldown; spamming deals no damage.
item.starrailexpress.crowbar.desc: Right-click to permanently break open a door. Can be repaired by Locksmith with a screwdriver.
item.starrailexpress.grenade.desc: Thrown weapon. Right-click to throw, kills players within a radius of the landing point. Hold right-click to charge for longer distance. Grenades are blocked by player entities.
item.starrailexpress.firecracker.desc: Right-click to place on the ground, emits a gunshot sound after 15s.
item.starrailexpress.revolver.desc: Basic ranged weapon, right-click to shoot.
item.starrailexpress.derringer.desc: 2s cooldown, refills ammo only when hitting/killing a player. No sanity penalty.
item.starrailexpress.sniper_rifle.desc: Extreme range, slower fire rate. Requires Magnum Bullets to reload. Can attach a scope. Crouch + right-click to aim down scope. Kills players 50+ blocks away ignoring shields.
item.starrailexpress.magnum_bullet.desc: Large caliber bullets, used to reload the sniper rifle.
item.starrailexpress.scope.desc: Telescopic scope, can be attached to the sniper rifle.
item.starrailexpress.body_bag.desc: Single-use, removes a corpse on the ground.
item.starrailexpress.blackout.desc: Turns off all lights in the map upon purchase.
item.starrailexpress.psycho_mode.desc: Upon purchase, the killer enters Psycho Mode, attacking with a bat, gains 1 shield (except Jester).
item.starrailexpress.poison_vial.desc: Right-click on a food platter or drink tray to poison the next player who consumes food/drink from it.
item.starrailexpress.scorpion.desc: Right-click to place on a bed. Scorpion venom spreads to nearby beds, poisoning players who sleep in them.
item.starrailexpress.note.desc: Sticky note, used to write messages. Crouch + right-click to write text, right-click to stick on walls.
item.noellesroles.giant_note.desc: Creates a 5x larger note. The Reporter can stick it onto other players.
item.starrailexpress.binding_tool.desc: Binding tool, used to link security monitors.
item.starrailexpress.nunchuck.desc: Nunchaku, exclusive weapon of the Martial Arts Instructor. See class description for details.
item.starrailexpress.lockpick.desc: Right-click to open any door. Shift + right-click on a door to lock it.
item.noellesroles.foodstuff.desc: Ingredients, exclusive item for the Chef class.
item.noellesroles.pan.desc: Frying pan, used for cooking food. Exclusive item for the Chef class.
item.noellesroles.once_revolver.desc: Revolver that can only be fired once.
item.noellesroles.handcuffs.desc: Handcuffs. Right-click to handcuff a player. Handcuffed players can break free by continuously sneaking.
item.noellesroles.patroller_revolver.des: Patroller's special pistol with extremely short firing cooldown.
item.noellesroles.night_vision_glasses.d: Night vision goggles, provide night vision when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_helmet.desc: Diving helmet, provides water breathing and Dolphin's Grace when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_boots.desc: Diving boots, provide Depth Strider 3 when worn.
item.noellesroles.fake_knife.desc: Fake knife, looks real but cannot kill.
item.noellesroles.yinyang_sword.desc: Black and white weapon. Left click: Dash 6 blocks to kill. Right click: 1s wind-up, 4-block AOE kill.
item.noellesroles.fake_revolver.desc: Fake revolver, looks real but can only fire five times and cannot kill.
item.noellesroles.fake_bat.desc: Fake bat, looks real but cannot deal damage.
item.noellesroles.fake_psycho_mode.desc: Fake Psycho Mode, used to confuse others. Exclusive to Magician.
item.noellesroles.fake_grenade.desc: Fake grenade, looks real but cannot be thrown.
item.noellesroles.fake_lockpick.desc: Fake lockpick, looks real but unusable.
item.noellesroles.fake_crowbar.desc: Fake crowbar, looks real but unusable.
item.noellesroles.fake_body_bag.desc: Fake body bag, looks real but cannot bag bodies.
item.noellesroles.delusion_vial.desc: Delusion Vial. Purchasable in the Jester's shop. Makes a player think they are poisoned, but not lethal.
item.noellesroles.defibrillator.desc: Defibrillator, exclusive to Doctor. Long press right-click on a player; if they die within 120 seconds, they will revive after 30 seconds.
item.noellesroles.boxing_glove.desc: Boxing Glove, exclusive to Boxer. Long press right-click to raise, release to knockback, stun, and put all target's items on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.antidote_reagent.desc: Long press right-click on a player to check if they are poisoned. Has limited uses.
item.noellesroles.conspiracy_page.desc: Exclusive to Conspirator. Right-click to open page and guess a class. Correct guess kills the target.
item.noellesroles.blank_cartridge.desc: Exclusive to Slippery Ghost. Right-click on a player to put their revolver on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.smoke_grenade.desc: Exclusive to Slippery Ghost. Creates a large smoke cloud on impact. 30s cooldown.
item.noellesroles.chlorine_bomb.desc: Exclusive to Poisoner. Poisons players within radius upon impact.
item.noellesroles.purify_bomb.desc: Exclusive to Doctor. Cures poison for players within radius upon impact.
item.noellesroles.flash_grenade.desc: Flashbang. Blinds players looking at it.
item.noellesroles.decoy_grenade.desc: Decoy grenade. Continuously emits gunshot sounds after being thrown.
item.noellesroles.reinforcement.desc: Reinforcement tool. Right-click on a door to reinforce it against 1 crowbar hit. Crouch + right-click to remove installed door items.
item.noellesroles.screwdriver.desc: Screwdriver. Crouch + right-click to remove items installed on doors. Locksmith can also use it to repair doors (restore doors broken by crowbar).
item.noellesroles.alarm_trap.desc: Alarm trap. Triggers an alarm when crowbar is used. Locks the door when installed.
item.noellesroles.delivery_box.desc: Right-click on a player to open an exchange interface, allowing both players to swap items.
item.noellesroles.hallucination_bottle.d: 2 durability. Right-click to force players in range to twist their view 3 times.
item.noellesroles.written_note.desc: Exclusive to Recorder. Right-click to record a player's class.
item.noellesroles.bomb.desc: Exclusive to Bomber. Right-click on a player to pass the bomb. Explodes after a delay, killing the holder.
item.noellesroles.wheelchair.desc: Exclusive to Old Man. Right-click to place a wheelchair on the ground.
item.noellesroles.lock.desc: Lock, used to lock doors. When a Killer uses a lockpick, they must manually complete a lockpicking minigame.
item.noellesroles.pocket_watch.desc: Pocket watch. Right-click to check in-game time. 60s cooldown.
item.noellesroles.adrenaline.desc: Single-use, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to increase their stamina cap by 2.
item.noellesroles.antibiotic.desc: Single-use, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to cure poison.
item.noellesroles.hedinghong.desc: Single-use, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to poison them.
item.noellesroles.toilet_poison.desc: Single-use, exclusive to Poisoner. Right-click on a toilet to poison the next player who uses it.
item.noellesroles.dogskin_plaster.desc: Single-use, exclusive to Alchemist. Right-click on a player to prevent sanity loss for 30 seconds.
Single-use. Right-click on a player to apply one random buff effect. Notifies target of effect.
item.noellesroles.fire_axe.desc: Exclusive to Firefighter. 3 durability. Long press right-click to raise and kill a target (consumes 3 durability). Crouch + right-click on a door to break it open (consumes 1 durability). Cannot be used to kill unless at full durability.
item.noellesroles.throwing_knife.desc: Press Q to throw. Right-click to raise the knife and kill.
item.noellesroles.rope.desc: Exclusive to Rescuer. Right-click to pull the nearest player within a straight line towards you.
item.noellesroles.extinguisher.desc: Exclusive to Firefighter. 5 durability. Right-click (or hold) to spray a player, applying Slowness and Blindness. Removes gasoline from Arsonist's victims.
item.noellesroles.passbook.desc: Exclusive to Accountant. Right-click to deposit money into the passbook (max 300 coins). Drops and passes to a nearby good player upon death. Can be dropped.
item.noellesroles.alchemy_material.desc: Exclusive to Alchemist. Used to craft potions.
item.noellesroles.signature_paper.desc: Exclusive to Star. Right-click to sign normally. Crouch + right-click to sign a life & death pact. See class description.
item.noellesroles.life_and_death_shape.d: Life & death pact. Allows the Star to take one fatal blow for you.
item.noellesroles.signed_paper.desc: Signed paper. Holder can see the Star's position continuously and gains Speed 1 when looking at them.
item.noellesroles.bowen_badge.desc: Bowen Badge, exclusive to Jotaro. Long press right-click for 3s to dash, killing targets hit and knocking back others.
item.noellesroles.shisiye.desc: Exclusive to Maid Sakuya. Grants Speed 10 when consumed.
item.noellesroles.problem_set.desc: Problem set. Right-click to start solving problems. Correct answers grant rewards, failures inflict penalties.
item.noellesroles.antidote.desc: Right-click on a player to cure poison. Goes on cooldown after use.
item.noellesroles.pill.desc: Edible pill. Cures poison when bought from Doctor's shop, inflicts poison when bought from Poisoner's shop.
item.noellesroles.toxin.desc: Single-use ranged weapon. Right-click on a player to poison the target.
item.noellesroles.catalyst.desc: Exclusive to Poisoner. Right-click to instantly kill all poisoned players.
item.noellesroles.bandit_revolver.desc: Pistol used by Bandit and Executioner. Shorter range.
item.noellesroles.stalker_knife.desc: Exclusive phase 2 weapon for Stalker. Right-click to charge and stab, killing target. Progression increases on kill. Crouch + right-click for fast charge. 10s attack cooldown.
Exclusive phase 2 off-hand weapon for Stalker. Right-click to charge and stab, killing target. Progression increases on kill. Crouch + right-click for fast charge. 10s attack cooldown.
item.stupid_express.jerry_can.desc: Exclusive to Arsonist. Right-click to douse a player with gasoline.
item.stupid_express.lighter.desc: Exclusive to Arsonist. Right-click to ignite doused players. See class description.
item.starrailexpress.camera.desc: Surveillance camera. Functions like a real-life camera.
item.starrailexpress.dark_toilet.desc: Dark toilet, task block. Right-click to sit and complete the 'use toilet' task.
item.starrailexpress.light_toilet.desc: Light toilet, task block. Right-click to sit and complete the 'use toilet' task.
item.starrailexpress.security_monitor.de: Security monitor. Used to view surveillance camera feeds.
item.noellesroles.monitoring_terminal.de: Remote monitoring terminal. Right-click a security monitor to bind, then right-click air to view the bound monitor.
item.noellesroles.ninja_knife.desc: Single-use. Ninja's melee weapon. Right-click to instantly assassinate a target silently.
item.noellesroles.ninja_shuriken.desc: Single-use. Ninja's ranged weapon. Long press right-click to throw silently.
item.noellesroles.mercenary_contract.des: Exclusive to Mercenary. Others can right-click to sign a contract, choose a target, and pay 175 coins. Mercenary right-clicks a signed contract to receive payment and locate the target. Can be dropped with Q.
item.noellesroles.riot_shield.desc: Exclusive to Guard. When held in main/off-hand, blocks one frontal attack.
item.noellesroles.baton.desc: Exclusive to Guard. Melee weapon, 4 durability. Left-click to stun. Two hits within 4 seconds kills.
item.noellesroles.radio.desc: Right-click to use. Allows long-range voice communication with other radio users.
item.noellesroles.short_shotgun.desc: Single-use. Kills all players within a 2-block cone.
item.noellesroles.executioner_gun.desc: Exclusive to The Fool. Only damages players with the 'Heretic' effect (instant kill). Starts with 1 bullet. Can only be reloaded via Tarot Club meeting.
item.noellesroles.honored_note.desc: Purchasable by The Fool. Right-click on wall/floor to place indestructible text entity. Players can pray by pressing J near the note to join the 'Tarot Club'.
item.noellesroles.spirit_cloak.desc: Purchasable by The Fool. Right-click to gain 5 seconds of invincibility (cannot attack, movement unchanged). 90s cooldown.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_byprod: Byproduct from cleaning tasks. Exchange at DNF exchange task points for 1 emerald.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_task_tool.desc: Look at DNF task point and hold right-click for 8 seconds to complete task.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_task_p: DNF cleaning task point. Use task tool to hold right-click and clean.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_exchange_task_p: DNF exchange task point. Exchange 1 cleaning byproduct for 1 emerald.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_toxic_heart.des: Special material obtained by Poisoner after poisoning a kill. 5 can be used in the Redemption recipe.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_poti: Redemption potion. Crafting two triggers an independent ending for Chef and Poisoner.
Old diary found by Chef at a config point. Contains clues about the Old Chef, Poisoner, and Redemption potion.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_form: Redemption formula obtained when Poisoner and Chef meet. Right-click with materials to craft two Redemption potions.
item.starrailexpress.drawing_board.desc:
You can obtain items by drawing their texture on the drawing board.
Right-click to open, paint in the drawing area, and when you confirm, the system will recognize the painting content. If an item is successfully recognized, you will receive the drawn item and consume 1 drawing board.
If the item texture contains white, please use white from the palette to fill it in. The system will not recognize background white.
If image recognition fails, you can modify individual pixels and try again. Image recognition is not 100% accurate (random scribbles might accidentally match other items).
 
You cannot obtain the following items through the drawing board:
- Drawing board/Grenade/Lockpick/Bat/Derringer/Scorpion/Sheriff faction special weapons (except Baton)
- Pistols will only be recognized as Revolvers, Knives will only be recognized as normal Knives
- Chlorine Bomb/Purify Bomb/Toxin Reagent/Pills/Hallucination Potion/Frying Pan/Sulfuric Acid Bucket/Blank Cartridge/Key Blank
- Neutral faction exclusive items/Fake items/Vanilla Minecraft items
- Pharmacist/Superstar/Fool/Time Stopper/Photographer exclusive items
- All keys except Conductor Key/Crowbar/Paperclip
item.noellesroles.zero_one_five_gun.desc: Exclusive pistol. Right-click to shoot. Auto-fires a second shot after 1.2s. First hit applies 3s Slowness II, second hit kills. 15s cooldown after both shots. 30 block range.
